title: Clown 2
overview: Seeking a fresh start, a troubled young woman moves in with her eccentric aunt in a seemingly sleepy small town—only to find that the locals have unusual interest in her family’s past. As she delves deeper, the body count rises. This dark horror-comedy sequel/sendup to the 2006 film, examines inherited secrets, cultish clowns, and the fine line between laughter and terror!
